article_title: 'I made £100,000 of TikTok sales in one day': The business of live shopping

tasks.prompt: What business trend does the article examine?
options: Closing all physical shops in Britain
Using television adverts instead of the internet
Selling only second-hand goods through auctions
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הכתבה בוחנת את הצמיחה של קניות בשידור חי ברשתות חברתיות.

tasks.prompt: How much did one seller say was generated in TikTok sales in a single day?
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הכותרת והכתבה מציגות יום מכירות שבו נרשמו מכירות של מאה אלף ליש״ט.

tasks.prompt: Why can live shopping feel different from an ordinary online product page?
options: It removes all prices from products
It combines presentation, questions and real-time interaction
It prevents customers from comparing products
It works only for people inside a physical shop
tasks.correct_answer: It combines presentation, questions and real-time interaction
tasks.explanation_hebrew: השידור החי יוצר קשר ואינטראקציה בין המגישים לקונים בזמן אמת.

tasks.prompt: What does the platform normally receive when a product is sold?
In the article, what does “revenue” mean, and how is it different from profit? Answer in 2–4 sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Revenue is the total money generated by sales
Profit is what remains after costs, fees and commissions
A large sales figure does not automatically mean equally large profit

tasks.prompt: Why are profit margins important to sellers using live-shopping platforms?
options: High viewer numbers always remove all costs
Platform commission and product costs reduce what the seller keeps
Margins determine the length of every livestream
Low-margin products cannot be shown on camera
tasks.correct_answer: Platform commission and product costs reduce what the seller keeps
tasks.explanation_hebrew: גם כאשר המכירות גבוהות, עלויות המוצר ועמלות הפלטפורמה מצמצמות את הרווח שנשאר לעסק.

tasks.prompt: What roles do presenters play during a live-shopping broadcast? Answer in 2–4 sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: They interact with viewers and answer questions
They encourage viewers to buy during the livestream

tasks.prompt: Write an 80–120 word summary of the article without copying sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Live shopping is becoming regular consumer behaviour
Sellers use presenters and real-time interaction to build connection
One seller reported £100,000 of TikTok sales in one day
Platforms take commission and businesses still need healthy margins

tasks.prompt: Explain in 2–4 sentences why a high sales figure may attract attention but not tell the whole business story.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Sales or revenue is not the same as profit
Costs, commissions and low margins must be considered
The business still needs a sustainable strategy

tasks.prompt: Write a two-sentence conclusion explaining both the appeal and the commercial risk of live shopping.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Appeal: connection, entertainment, interaction or convenience
Risk: commissions, weak margins, dependence on platforms or uncertain profitability
